overall.description: Static shot of a Gothic-style wizard's classroom interior from a video game, featuring stone walls, tall arched windows with purple drapes, a central ornate rug, and wooden tables displaying magical artifacts. A character in wizard robes stands near the left wall observing the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic wizard classroom with study tables and magical artifacts

agents.ego_description: Standing stationary in the classroom, observing the surroundings and the magical artifacts arranged on the tables

notable_agents.action: Wizard character in dark robes standing near the left wall, facing toward the center of the room

entered.detail: Tall arched window with stone tracery allowing bright natural light to stream into the room
Heavy purple velvet drapes framing the left Gothic window
Large ornate circular rug with intricate patterns covering the center floor area
Dark wooden study table with curved legs holding various magical objects
Glass sphere resting on a metallic stand on the wooden table
Second tall arched window on the right wall with stone framing
Dark blue heavy drapes framing the right Gothic window
Grey stone block walls with Gothic architectural details and texture
Wooden bookcase against the back wall filled with stacked books and tomes

segments.scene_description: A static view of a Gothic-style wizard's classroom interior with stone walls and tall arched windows draped with purple and blue curtains. Natural light filters through the windows, illuminating the central ornate rug and wooden study tables adorned with crystal balls and magical artifacts. A wizard character stands near the left wall observing the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a Gothic-style wizard's classroom, capturing a scene of quiet magical study. It begins with a wide view of the interior, where natural light filters through tall arched windows draped in purple and blue curtains. This illumination casts a soft glow over the stone walls and a central ornate rug, highlighting the wooden study tables adorned with crystal balls and various magical artifacts. The camera remains fixed as a wizard character stands near the left wall, silently observing the stillness of the room.
